details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (6 .md files), .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files, reports/audit/ exists. Failure is due to reports/board/ absence.

moltbot/ directory exists with active code: sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, agents/. Scripts referencing Clawdbot/Moltbot: scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md also contains references. Reports/audit and docs references (documentation of removal) are excluded per policy.
